title: Procheiron deployment config (.procheiron/config.yaml)
description: The deployment binding read by procheiron_resolve.load_config. Defines every {paths.<key>} token, the active profile, and (through the profile) the constitutional-authority mapping. This file is SELF_ACTION_POLICY §12-protected. Validate by parsing the YAML to JSON first. The set of tokens that MUST be present is the union of tokens referenced by the parameterized Core doc set — see required_tokens.json (A2-37 dangling-token closure). additionalProperties on paths is true so a deployment may add tokens; the required list pins the ones Core references.

profile.description: Active deployment profile name; must match a directory under .procheiron/profiles/<profile>/ and the lint's expected_profile.

root.description: Deployment root. The resolved run-time root (most-explicit-wins) remains authoritative; mismatches are surfaced, not silently honored.

paths.description: Token map. Relative values resolve under root; absolute values are used as-is. The required keys are exactly the tokens the parameterized Core docs reference (see required_tokens.json).

policy_defaults.description: Deployment policy flags (local_first, provenance_required, agents_may_propose_not_promote, secrets_allowed, ...). Booleans expected.

secrets_allowed.description: Must be false: secrets never belong in the commons (SCHEMA rule 8; AGENT_BOOT §5).
